testsuite.name: 批量操作测试

testcase.name: 预加载特征 - 验证方法被调用

failure.message:
Wanted but not invoked: restTemplate.postForObject( <any>, <any>, interface java.util.Map ); -> at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:526)
However, there was exactly 1 interaction with this mock: restTemplate.postForObject( "http://feature-platform/api/features", [preload1], interface java.util.Map ); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150)

testsuite.system-out: 21:27:26.894 [Test worker] INFO com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService -- Preloading features: [preload1] 21:27:26.897 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] ERROR com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService -- Failed to call external feature platform org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.PotentialStubbingProblem: Strict stubbing argument mismatch. Please check: - this invocation of 'postForObject' method: restTemplate.postForObject( "http://feature-platform/api/features", [preload1], interface java.util.Map ); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150) - has following stubbing(s) with different arguments: 1. restTemplate.postForObject(null, null, null); -> at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderServiceTest$BatchOperationTests.shouldPreloadFeatures(FeatureProviderServiceTest.java:259) Typically, stubbing argument mismatch indicates user mistake when writing tests. Mockito fails early so that you can debug potential problem easily. However, there are legit scenarios when this exception generates false negative signal: - stubbing the same method multiple times using 'given().will()' or 'when().then()' API Please use 'will().given()' or 'doReturn().when()' API for stubbing. - stubbed method is intentionally invoked with different arguments by code under test Please use default or 'silent' JUnit Rule (equivalent of Strictness.LENIENT). For more information see javadoc for PotentialStubbingProblem class. at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:504) at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.fetchExternalFeatures(FeatureProviderService.java:150) at com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService.lambda$preloadFeatures$7(FeatureProviderService.java:168) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncRun.run(CompletableFuture.java:1804) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncRun.exec(CompletableFuture.java:1796) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(ForkJoinTask.java:373) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(ForkJoinPool.java:1182) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.scan(ForkJoinPool.java:1655) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.runWorker(ForkJoinPool.java:1622) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(ForkJoinWorkerThread.java:165) 21:27:26.898 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] INFO com.example.ruleengine.service.FeatureProviderService -- Preloaded 0 features
